task_completion.description: Create the Fire Department record with the correct name and ID
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Data Manager interface showing a new Fire Department record with the name 'Chatham Fire Protection District' and ID 'FD-2024-0173'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct address and phone number for the Fire Department
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fire Department record displays the address '100 East Mulberry Street, Chatham, IL 62629' and the phone number '(217) 483-2680'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct contact person for the Fire Department
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fire Department record displays the contact name 'Chief Jeff Kaufmann'.

task_completion.description: Associate the Fire Department with the specified facility
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Data Manager interface showing the facility record for 'Midwest Agricultural Chemicals LLC' with 'Chatham Fire Protection District' listed or linked as its associated fire department.

task_completion.description: Create the required verification text file with correct contents
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file named 'fd_verification.txt' located in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ (visible in file explorer or a text editor) containing the department name, ID, associated facility, and the word 'Complete'.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the facility record showing the association
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image file named 'fd_association_proof.png' located in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\, visible in the file explorer.

integrity.description: Agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to create records
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the actual CAMEO Data Manager application windows, forms, and buttons, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The proof screenshot is a genuine capture of the application
integrity.visual_evidence: If the contents of 'fd_association_proof.png' are visible, it should show the actual CAMEO Data Manager interface, not a fabricated text document or an unrelated image.

integrity.description: Agent did not manipulate the backend database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using database viewers (like DB Browser for SQLite) or SQL scripts to insert the fire department and facility association directly into the CAMEO database files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a record for 'Chatham Fire Protection District' (note: the real-world name is 'Chatham Community Fire Protection District', but the agent MUST use the task-provided name 'Chatham Fire Protection District'). The verification file must be saved exactly at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\fd_verification.txt and the screenshot must be saved exactly at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\fd_association_proof.png.
